nameMeanings.name: Perley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of of   Purley  . This surname is very rare in Britain.
Possibly also a variant of   Berley   2, a surname of Swiss German or German origin.
Possibly also an Americanized form of some similar-sounding Jewish surname.

variants.name: Purley
meanings: English: habitational name from Purleigh (Essex), Purley (Berkshire), or Purley in Sanderstead (Surrey). The Essex and Berkshire placenames derive from Old English pur ‘bittern’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. The Surrey placename is from Old English pyrige ‘pear tree’ + lēah.

nameMeanings.name: Bertha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of a Continental Germanic name, a short form of various compound women's personal names derived from berht ‘famous’ (akin to Modern English bright). It probably existed in England before the Conquest, and was certainly reinforced by Norman use, but fell out of use in the 15th century. It was reintroduced into the English-speaking world from Germany in the 19th century, but has once again gone out of fashion.

en.lifeSummary: Bertha M Perley was born in 1522, in Wales as the daughter of Wm. Moulton. She had at least 1 son with Allen Parle. She died in 1586, in Surrey, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Tydd St Mary, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.Tydd St Mary, Lincolnshire, England: イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアトイッド スト マリー
ja.lifeSummary: Bertha M Perleyは1522年にウェールズでWm. Moultonの娘として生まれた。彼女はAllen Parleとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1586年にイギリスイギリススリーで64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアトイッド スト マリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bertha M Perley(은)는 1522년 웨일스에서 Wm. Moulton의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Allen Parle(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1586년 영국 잉글랜드 수리에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 타이드 스트 메리에 묻혔다.
